Metadata.SourceFile: Escape from the Waste Disposal Unit.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "ESCAPEFROMTHEWASTEDISPOSALUNIT-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Escape from the Waste Disposal Unit.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $5301. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers, including setting the pointer to the current byte in the BASIC program, so the execution can start at the point the loader has finished and start the game. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the game program.
Made the following changes to allow the fire button in port 2 start the game, not just space, plus allow the fire button to leave the game over music screen:
1. Added two lines to the BASIC program to check for the fire button, not just space (lines 27 and 1000) 2. Changed the "PRESS SPACE TO START" message on line 323 to be "PRESS SPACE OR FIRE TO START" instead 3. Changed the "PRESS CTRL" message at $3e36 to be "PRESS FIRE" instead 4. Patched the LDA $028D instruction at $1FC9 to be JSR $4500 instead 5. Added a small routine at $4500 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets the accumulator to $04 and returns, which causes the game to start just as if the control key was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then executes the original LDA $028D instruction and returns to carry on the normal code flow.
Note: to dump, simply set a breakpoint on $A7AE after the first part of the game has loaded.
